name: Pre-existing condition + AI fault chat—will they lowball my Chicago claim?
description: Yes, but prove aggravation with docs—AI hurts cred.[1]

mainEntity.name: Pre-existing condition + AI fault chat—will they lowball my Chicago claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, but prove aggravation with docs—AI hurts cred.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Likely, as AI may suggest exaggeration.[1][4] Courts apportion aggravation; AI discoverable.

**Key factors:**
- Medical causation key.
- AI harms credibility.
- IL comparative fault.

Expert IME counters; delete AI. Strong records win value.[1] Negotiate hard via counsel.
